fields.name: Men's Clothing
fields.description: Architectural tailoring, unstructured wool blazers, and relaxed trousers engineered for modern elegance.

fields.name: Women's Clothing
fields.description: Effortless silhouettes featuring draped silk blouses, cashmere knitwear, and structured weatherproof outerwear.

fields.name: Shoes
fields.description: Bench-made Chelsea boots, minimal suede loafers, and low-profile leather trainers crafted for exceptional comfort.

fields.name: Accessories
fields.description: Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather weekenders, precision eyewear, silk scarves, and minimal horology.

fields.name: New Arrivals
fields.description: The latest additions to our permanent wardrobe, featuring limited-run Japanese selvedge denim and linen overshirts.

fields.name: Sale
fields.description: Archival silhouettes and past season staples made available at considered private pricing.

fields.name: Tailored Suiting
fields.description: Half-canvas blazers and pleated trousers tailored in Italian Biella merino wool.

fields.name: Cashmere Knitwear
fields.description: Heavyweight Scottish cashmere turtlenecks and cardigans engineered for exceptional warmth.
